color.reason: Warm dark page canvas derived from official dark brown logo/character-card samples.
Panel/input surface in CSS and parchment-brown UI.
Warm parchment foreground for text over dark surfaces.
Gold-muted labels and media link text.
Input border and antique brown frame evidence.
Stable brown action color in CSS controls; do not use blue magic glow as primary.
Sampled from wallpapers and scenes, not UI controls.

radius.reason: Ornate media/card frames are visually straight-edged; keep frame radius at zero in demo styling.
CSS input radius is 5px; closest primitive is 4px.
Button evidence only; do not apply this radius to framed cards/media containers.

spacing.reason: Site uses image-heavy sections; exact layout values are not reliable from screenshot-only evidence.

divider.reason: Plain divider color can follow --du-border-1, but HPMA frame corners require a style-only frame recipe.
